betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6The Bloodmoon Rises§f

§aA crimson shadow falls over the night sky!§f
Every evening, there is a §c5% chance§f that a §cBloodmoon§f event will trigger. When the moon turns red, the surface becomes a deadly warzone for the entire night.

§6Survival Mechanics§f:
§b• Unrelenting Hordes§f: Monsters spawn §c4× faster§f and the maximum spawn limit is multiplied by §c4×§f.
§b• Proximity Spawns§f: Enemies can spawn as close as §c12 blocks§f next to you (vanilla is §e24 blocks§f). Watch your back constantly.
§b• Surface Only§f: These aggressive spawning mechanics only apply to the surface. You are safe from the increased spawns while underground in caves.
§b• Sleep Disabled§f: The intense lunar energy will §cprevent§f you from sleeping in beds or sleeping bags to skip the night.
§b• Warning Message§f: You will receive a chat notification at dusk when a Bloodmoon begins.

§6Atmospheric Visuals§f:
The moon, sky, and light will be tinted blood red, and the fog will turn pitch black, drastically reducing your visibility.

§cWarning§f: Monsters spawned by this event §cwill not perish at dawn§f — you must fight them off or find shelter until you can secure the area.
